scope: Five additional independently selectable 100-question EPPP practice banks

selectionPolicy.timeSensitiveException: Stable APA Ethics Code concepts only; Tarasoff, HIPAA, licensure, court, subpoena, reporting, abuse, and Goldwater claims remain quarantined.
selectionPolicy.answerLengthPolicy: Severe clues were excluded outside the professional quota; retained professional concepts were re-authored with parallel response framing.

limitations: Editorial and automated review are not psychometric calibration.
Topic-matched authoritative sources require continued human review when source guidance changes.
